summary: Reworked the opening to avoid mirroring chapter 15's temporal scaffold and added a light exit handoff that seeds Daro's rumor reaching Knot Bend ahead of him.
edits: Reframed the opening around Nami's sensory view of Salt Room instead of a matching 'By the time' construction.
Added a final transition line that points the rumor toward Knot Bend before chapter 15 opens.
Checked the style bible for calibration-only example lines; none appeared verbatim in the chapter.
